name: pe-agent-os
description: Agent operating system for small private equity firms. Automates investment workflows and replaces G&A functions at portfolio companies.

commands.name: ic-memo
commands.description: Draft an investment committee memo from deal materials

commands.name: kpi-review
commands.description: Run finance G&A skill for a portco monthly close or KPI review

commands.name: improve-skill
commands.description: Analyze failure logs and propose a skill improvement

commands.name: run-evals
commands.description: Run the eval suite for a skill and report pass/fail

commands.name: new-skill
commands.description: Scaffold and draft a new skill following the PE Agent OS standard

mcp_connectors.name: pitchbook
mcp_connectors.purpose: Deal sourcing, sector comps, transaction multiples

mcp_connectors.name: chronograph
mcp_connectors.purpose: Portfolio company monitoring and KPI tracking

mcp_connectors.name: spglobal
mcp_connectors.purpose: Financial data, public comps, leverage benchmarks
